title: The Indicator Lie That's Keeping Traders Broke (2026)
description: Everyone thinks more indicators = more accuracy. Smart money traders know the truth. If you're still stacking RSI, MACD, and moving averages on your charts — this is why your funded account keeps blowing. R2F Trading breaks down the ICT truth behind clean charts and order blocks. Follow for daily smart money concepts.
script: More indicators. More accuracy. That's the biggest lie in trading — and it's why 80% of funded accounts blow before the first payout. Indicators are lagging. They react AFTER price moves. You're reading yesterday's news and wondering why you keep getting stopped out. Smart money doesn't use RSI. They use order blocks, fair value gaps, and liquidity. That's it. Clean chart. Precise entry. Every time. Strip your chart. Learn the ICT way. Follow R2F Trading — Harvest Wright's been trading this for over 10 years. Link in bio.
